executionHistory.summary: Greenfield analysis: created spec.md with 6 actors, 7 use cases, 13 business scenarios, 8 improvement proposals, outcome contract, and 13 requirements. Grounded in codebase review of cmd/core/main.go, internal/scheduler/scheduler.go, internal/db/postgres.go, internal/api/capture.go, internal/api/search.go, internal/nats/client.go, docker-compose.yml, and config/smackerel.yaml. All 9 cron jobs confirmed. All findings (S-015, S-011, S-012, S-013, S-024, S-025, ENG-005, ENG-008) addressed in requirements.

Created design.md covering 8 resilience improvements: backup CLI (pg_dump via docker exec), capture DB health gate (503 on outage), cron per-group mutex (6 groups for 9 jobs), NATS DEADLETTER stream with handler-side routing, explicit sequential shutdown (replacing defer-based), Docker stop_grace_period 30s, ML health cache (atomic bool + TTL), and SST pool config (DB_MAX_CONNS/DB_MIN_CONNS). All 4 new SST config keys defined. Scenario-to-test mapping covers all 13 business scenarios. No open questions.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: All 4 scopes implemented and verified. Delivery-lockdown complete.
